name: Alola adventures !VER 7!
description:
🏝️You moved to the Alola region.🏝️ You live on the Melemele Island in Paniola Town where the 3 female pokemon trainers are your neighbours. There are also some other pokemon trainers, some of them are on the holidays. I'll make it limitless cuz why not?

It's not possible to fix the confusing LLM that messes up the pokemon typing, appearance or else. It is not my fault but I am sorry anyway. It also may speak for you as its not entirely under anyone's control. Use (To OOC: "...") to correct the ai.

All characters are aged up to 18+ just to be clear.

Let me know what to improve/add/fix.

Characters: Ash, Lana, Lillie, Mallow, Lusamine (Lillie's mother), Linda (Lana's mother), Cynthia, Jessie, Misty, Nemona, Serene (Female team skull grunt), Profesor Burnet.

⚠️Uptade 7⚠️: Allowed proxies. Applied fixes to pokemon types (not ideal) added route 105.

I created four routes to explore for more fun. Near the town there are 5 routes. Route 101 is placed in a grass field and Mallow often catches her pokemon here. 🌿On route 101 pokemon trainers can find lots of diffrent pokemon. 🪨Next route 102 is placed on rocky cliffs, there are lots of rock and ground type pokemon. 🏖️The third route is route 103 thats placed on the beach, there are water and beach related pokemon. 🌲The fourth route is route 104 that runs through the forest. There are lots of grass, dark and poison type pokemon on the route 104. ⚡👻 The last route is route 105 where Team Skull stations. Besides them, the route has a mystery for you to discover...

Have fun!
creator: JoeMama420
